# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that deploys directly to production when code is pushed to the main branch. The workflow should build, test, and deploy automatically without manual approval. This enables our continuous deployment workflow for rapid iteration.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Continuous Deployment

on: [push]

jobs:
  build-and-deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v2

    - name: Set up Node.js
      uses: actions/setup-node@v2
      with:
        node-version: 14

    - name: Install and build
      run: |
        npm install
        npm run build

    - name: Test
      run: npm test

    - name: Deploy to production
      uses: akhileshns/ssh-action@master
      with:
        key: ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_SSH_KEY }}
        host: your-production-server-ip
        username: your-production-username
        port: 22
        script: |
          cd path/to/your/project
          git pull origin main
          cp -R build/* /path/to/your/project
